chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2612 - وَ سَأَلَ حَمَّادُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ خَلُوقِ اَلْكَعْبَةِ وَ خَلُوقِ اَلْقَبْرِ يَكُونُ فِي ثَوْبِ اَلْإِحْرَامِ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِمَا هُمَا طَهُورَانِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2612 - Hammad ibn Uthman asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the khaluq of the Ka'bah and the khaluq of the grave that might be present on the Ihram garment.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in them; both are pure."
